title: Roger Langridge
content:
{{Top|rwp}}
'''Roger Langridge''' is a comic book penciler who did the art for the [[2005]] [[Star Wars comic books|comic]] story "[[Fett Club (comic story)|Fett Club]]" by [[Kevin Rubio]].<ref name="Tales24">[[Star Wars Tales 24|''Star Wars Tales'' 24]]</ref>
